import redis


def cache_users(r: redis.Redis, users: list[dict]) -> None:
    with r.pipeline(transaction=False) as pipe:
        for user in users:
            pipe.hset(f"user:{user['id']}", mapping=user)
            pipe.expire(f"user:{user['id']}", 3600)
        pipe.execute()


def invalidate_sessions(r: redis.Redis, session_ids: list[str]) -> None:
    with r.pipeline(transaction=False) as pipe:
        for sid in session_ids:
            pipe.delete(f"session:{sid}")
        pipe.execute()


def update_counters(r: redis.Redis, event_names: list[str]) -> None:
    with r.pipeline(transaction=False) as pipe:
        for name in event_names:
            pipe.incr(f"counter:{name}")
            pipe.expire(f"counter:{name}", 86400)
        pipe.execute()
